title: RobustIDPS.ai — Advanced AI-Powered Intrusion Detection & Prevention System
description: A research-grade platform demonstrating 7 novel machine learning methods for adversarially robust network intrusion detection. Built as part of a PhD dissertation at MEPhI, Moscow, the system features real-time monitoring, drag-and-drop CSV/PCAP analysis, live traffic streaming, an ablation studio for method comparison, pre-computed research analytics across 6 datasets and 4 adversarial attacks, and support for 5 trained detection models (Surrogate Ensemble, Neural ODE, Optimal Transport, FedGTD, SDE-TGNN).
references: Anaedevha, R. N. (2024). Advanced AI-Powered Intrusion Detection Systems: Neural ODEs, Optimal Transport, and Federated Learning. PhD thesis, National Research Nuclear University MEPhI.
